title: Multiview World Generation
description: System generates synchronized multi-camera viewpoint video outputs from a single text prompt or conditioning video/image.

use_cases.name: Generate Multi-View World from Text Prompt
use_cases.description: User provides per-view text prompts (front, left, right, back, back-left, back-right). Pipeline generates a synchronized 6-camera video output.
steps: Parse per-view prompts (prompt, prompt_left, prompt_right, prompt_back, prompt_back_left, prompt_back_right)
generate_world_from_text(model, state_shape, data_batch, guidance, num_steps, seed) → latent sample
use_cases.output: [video_grid (H*2 x W*3), video (H x W)], prompt

use_cases.name: Generate Multi-View World from Video/Image Input
use_cases.description: User provides a conditioning image or video plus per-view prompts. Pipeline extends the visual input into synchronized 6-camera video.

use_cases.name: Encode Multi-View Latent State
use_cases.description: Encodes multi-view video tensor into latent space by splitting views, encoding per-view, and recombining.
steps: rearrange B C (V T) H W → (B V) C T H W
rearrange (B V) C T H W → B C (V T) H W

use_cases.name: Decode Multi-View Latent State
use_cases.description: Decodes multi-view latents back to pixel space.
steps: rearrange B C (V T) H W → (B V) C T H W
rearrange (B V) C T H W → B C (V T) H W

use_cases.name: Run Multi-View Diffusion Sampling (CFG)
use_cases.description: Iterative denoising loop with classifier-free guidance across all views simultaneously.
steps: For each timestep t: scale_model_input(xt, t)
use_cases.note: V2W variant additionally applies _augment_noise_with_latent() for conditioning frames and replaces indicated regions with ground-truth latent.

use_cases.name: Apply View Embeddings in DiT
use_cases.description: Injects per-camera view identity embeddings into the input sequence before transformer blocks.
steps: rearrange x → B C V T H W
rearrange back → B C (V T) H W

use_cases.name: Enable Context Parallel Inference
use_cases.description: Splits view-time dimension across GPU context parallel groups for multi-GPU inference.
steps: rearrange xt: B C (V T) H W → (B V) C T H W
rearrange back to B C (V T) H W for forward pass
rearrange (B V) C T H W → B C (V T) H W

use_cases.name: Safety Guardrail Check
use_cases.description: Optionally validates generated content before saving; blocks unsafe outputs.
steps: disable_guardrail flag checked at pipeline init
If guardrail blocks: log.critical('Guardrail blocked ...'), return None

use_cases.name: Condition on Input Frames (V2W)
use_cases.description: Sets up conditioning mask and augments conditioning frames with noise for video-to-world prediction.
steps: If video_cond_bool: condition_video_input_mask = indicator × ones else zeros
_augment_noise_with_latent(): blend augmented GT latent with noise in condition region

key_relationships: DiffusionMultiviewV2WModel extends DiffusionV2WModel (adds n_views, view-aware conditioning, context parallel support)
MultiviewGeneralDIT extends GeneralDIT (overrides build_patch_embed, build_pos_embed, prepare_embedded_sequence, forward_before_blocks)
MultiviewGeneralDIT uses GeneralDITTransformerBlock with n_views parameter in each block
MultiviewModelConfig extends DefaultModelConfig with n_views field
Pipeline._load_model creates DiffusionMultiviewT2WModel or DiffusionMultiviewV2WModel via load_model_by_config
config_highlights: Default views: front, left, right, back, back-left, back-right (6 automotive cameras)
Context parallel: supports multi-GPU via megatron parallel_state
